name: @clusterio/plugin-mock-external
description: Mock workspace plugin that DELIBERATELY requests a conflicting react (^17) so the test is falsifiable. The root pnpm.overrides (react -> catalog: ^18) must collapse this to the single workspace react. With the override, only one react exists under node_modules/.pnpm; remove the override and a second react@17 copy appears. See TESTPLAN.md Part A.
